name: Blackened Chicken and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Chef Paul Prudhomme's Poultry Magic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguini until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. Preheat an iron frying pan on the gas grill at high heat for 20 minutes.
3. Put poultry magic seasoning in a shallow bowl.
4. Put melted butter in another shallow bowl.
5. Dip chicken first in butter on both sides, then in Poultry Magic. Place in the preheated frying pan and cook 5-6 minutes on each side.
6. While cooking the chicken, melt the remaining butter in a Dutch oven. Add half and half and cayenne pepper. Heat over medium heat until the mixture bubbles.
7. Add linguini to the sauce. Cover and reduce heat to low. Simmer for a few minutes.
8. Remove chicken from the frying pan and slice into thin strips.
9. Serve the sliced chicken over hot linguini noodles and garnish with chopped tomatoes and green onions.
